One of the following courses is allowed and encouraged as an elective (students may not count more than one of the courses below toward the minor requirements):

Nonproﬁt Leadership and Social Innovation Minor

PLCY214 Leading and Investing in Social Change: Re- deﬁning and Experimenting with Philanthropy

PLCY359 Contemporary Issues in Political Leadership and Participation (PLCY359I Re-deﬁning and Experimenting with Philanthropy)

PLCY388 Special Topics in Public Policy (PLCY388G Global Perspectives on Leading and Investing in Social Change)

HONR349

Honors Colloquium (Re-deﬁning and

Experimenting with Philanthropy)
